overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player navigating through a massive electronic junkyard in a desert canyon. The player moves steadily forward through piles of discarded appliances and debris toward a column of black smoke, with a large dam visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert canyon landfill filled with electronic waste

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward through the junkyard toward the distant smoke column

entered.detail: tall rocky desert canyon wall with layered sedimentary rock formations
tall rocky desert canyon wall with snow or salt deposits near the top
large concrete dam spanning the canyon in the far distance
thick black smoke column rising from the junkyard ahead
large dark shipping container partially buried in debris
piles of discarded refrigerators, monitors, and electronic waste covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view moving through a vast desert canyon junkyard. The ground is completely covered with discarded appliances and metal debris. Tall canyon walls frame both sides while a large dam structure is visible in the far distance. A column of black smoke rises from the center of the junkyard ahead, serving as a focal point for the forward movement.

scene_state.functional_zone: central junkyard area approaching smoke source

events.description: red warning indicator appears at top of screen signaling entry into danger zone

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through deeper sections of the junkyard with scattered large debris

entered.detail: large blue industrial vehicle or crane partially visible among the junk

segments.scene_description: The player continues moving forward through increasingly dense piles of electronic waste. The smoke plume grows larger and closer, shifting from the far distance to the near mid-ground. A red warning indicator appears on screen suggesting a transition into a hazardous area. The canyon walls remain visible on both sides while the dam stays in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon wall base with sand dune accumulation

events.description: camera turns sharply to the right to face the canyon wall

agents.ego_description: pivoting right to examine the canyon wall and sand dune formations

entered.detail: large sand accumulation at the base of the canyon wall with drifting dust

segments.scene_description: The camera executes a sharp right turn, shifting focus from the smoke and dam ahead to the right canyon wall. The wall now dominates the center of the frame, revealing detailed rock strata and sand accumulation at its base. The smoke plume and dam move out of view to the left as the player examines the canyon geology and surrounding debris field.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a desert canyon junkyard that shifts from a focused approach toward a distant landmark to a detailed examination of the surrounding geology. It begins by advancing through a vast expanse of discarded appliances and metal debris, with a large dam and a rising column of black smoke serving as distant focal points between towering canyon walls. As the camera pushes deeper into the electronic waste, the smoke plume grows larger and more imposing in the mid-ground while a red warning indicator signals an entry into a hazardous zone. The scene then shifts abruptly as the camera executes a sharp right turn, moving the smoke and dam out of view to the left. Finally, the focus settles on the right canyon wall, revealing intricate rock strata and sand accumulations at the base of the cliff.
